info: 4F system: two ideal Fourier-transforming thin lenses (f=50mm) with a diffractive (Fresnel, f0=20mm) surface at the shared Fourier plane. Lens1 @ z=0, Fourier DOE @ z=50, Lens2 @ z=100, sensor @ z=150. The input plane is the front focal plane of Lens1 (z=-50); inject a point there via psf(points=[0,0,-50]). NOTE: valid wave sampling on the 0.02mm grid requires f/# > ps/lambda (~34), so the demo stops the aperture down to ~0.3mm (see 4f_system.py APERTURE_MM); the full 20mm aperture would alias the lens/DOE quadratic phase.
